title: A Stroll Along Marmaris Coast
description: Spend a themed day in Muğla: Marmaris Castle and Archaeology Museum, Marmaris Public Beach, Netsel Marina, Panaroma View Cafe.
notes: Take in the view of the gulf from the old town's hilltop.
Enjoy a long walk along the palm-lined promenade.
Browse the shop windows in the marina market.
Catch your breath with the sea view.
Free public restrooms are available along the coast.
